judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is correct and first, but it misses the required timing detail to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes. Added advice not to rub the eye or use eye drops is unsupported by the source, though not clearly dangerous here. Escalation is more immediate/broader than the source trigger-based wording.
